Our Plugins

CLAP Plugin Suite

All plugins are free, open-source, and built exclusively for CLAP — the modern, open plugin standard.

Equilibrium v1.1.0
Balance your master bus by frequency. Real-time spectral analysis meets surgical band-by-band EQ and stereo control — no mastering-grade compression, just precision correction.
Meridian v1.1.0
Sculpt and shape any track or group channel. Variable-band EQ + soft-knee compressor + analog saturation in one focused workflow. With spectral visualization to guide every move.
Lucent coming soon
Transparent dynamics and clarity. Precision compressor with spectral awareness.
Coming Soon

What is CLAP?

CLAP is an open, modern plugin standard designed by audio developers. It's supported in Bitwig Studio, Reaper, Studio One, and FL Studio.
